input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Full MavenCli goal execution can touch user.dir, the default local repository, settings, and possibly remote repositories; generated tests should prefer unit-level Maven core APIs or harmless CLI paths like --help/--version unless they deliberately isolate those filesystem/network effects.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: maven-core 2.0.7 is an in-process Maven engine/CLI library whose POM already brings the Maven modules, Plexus/ClassWorlds, Wagon transports, and related compile/runtime dependencies needed for normal tests; the reported failure is API signature drift in existing generated tests, not missing setup.
